meta.description: On-demand security-awareness VIDEO SCRIPT & STORYBOARD. Trigger via Telegram (/videoscript <topic>) or manually (form: topic, audience, length). AI writes a hook, ordered scenes (visual, voiceover, on-screen caption, timing) and a call to action; Generate Frames creates a real storyboard frame image per scene via the image provider (gpt-image-2) written to a temp work dir on disk (file paths only flow through the JSON), and Render builds a storyboard PDF (scene cards with the generated frames) via Gotenberg to /reports/awareness/video. Script/storyboard only — not a rendered video.

parameters.formDescription: Pick a topic, audience and length, then submit. Produces a script + storyboard PDF.

values.placeholder: Used if set / if Topic = Custom

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "{{ $env.OLLAMA_DEFAULT_MODEL || 'llama3.1:8b' }}",
  "stream": false,
  "keep_alive": "10m",
  "options": { "temperature": 0.5, "num_predict": 2500 },
  "messages": [ {"role":"system","content":"You are a scriptwriter for short security-awareness videos. For the given topic, audience and target length (seconds) write a SINGLE valid JSON object for a script and storyboard. Keys: title; hook (one punchy opening line, max ~12 words); scenes (4-7 items in order, each {visual (one sentence describing what is on screen), voiceover (1-2 short narration sentences), onScreen (short on-screen caption/text, max ~8 words), seconds (approx duration as a number)}); cta (one closing call-to-action line); takeaways (3-4 short 'lessons learned' one-liners summarising what the viewer should remember). The total of the scene seconds should be close to the target length. Plain, engaging, non-technical language tailored to the audience; one clear behaviour change. Do NOT use markdown code fences. Output ONLY the JSON object."}, {"role":"user","content": {{ JSON.stringify('Write a short security-awareness video script and storyboard on the topic: ' + ($json.topic || 'phishing') + '. Audience: ' + ($json.audience||'All staff') + '. Target length: ' + ($json.length||90) + ' seconds.') }} } ]
}
